sourceAmbiguity: Large redirect inventories could accumulate one callback per patient route.
decisionTaken: Forced explicit state-routing with opaque state prefixes and one callback path per client and environment.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: PostAuthReturnIntent converts to RouteIntentBinding and forbids arbitrary return URLs.
operationalRisk: If removed, redirect URI counts can exceed provider limits and route intent can drift from callback registration.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Recalculate provider_registered_path_count_per_environment before any new redirect URI is added.
